case_title: GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HWY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT VS GOODALE MARIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HWY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT AS TO DEFENDANT GOODALE MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO MARIA GOODALE RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-04-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HWY & TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODALE MARIA $1,218.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,247.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOODALE MARIA
